scripts.build: rollup -c && npm run build:types && npm run openv-webos:build
scripts.build:types: tsc -p packages/openv-api/tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p packages/openv-core/tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p packages/party.openv.api.fs/tsconfig.types.json && tsc -p packages/party.openv.api.registry/tsconfig.types.json
